rulings.Case Title: LBUBUS 2004-C8 BAY HYDE STREET LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. RMSV BAY CITI PROPERTIES I DE, LLC, A DELAWARE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Applicaiton For Instructions On And Modifications To Order Appointing Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 30, 2011, line 3, OTHER TODD ROBINETTE Application For Instructions On And Modifications To Order Appointing Receiver. RECEIVER'S APPLICATION FOR MODIFICATIONS TO ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE REQUEST TO CHANGE THE FEE STRUCTURE IS DENIED. THE REQUEST TO BE ENTITLED TO FEES UP TO THE POINT THE MOTION TO DISMISS IS FILED IN THE BESS CASE IS GRANTED. IF THE BESS CASE IS NOT DISMISSED, THE RECEIVER MAY REQUEST FURTHER FEES. THE COURT GRANTS THE ORDER AUTHORIZING THE RECEIVER TO OBTAIN COVERAGE COUNSEL UP TO THE POINT OF THE DECISION ON THE MOTION TO DISMISS. TENANTS REQUEST FOR FEES TO BE SET ASIDE FOR RECOVERY IN THE BESS CASE IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS AND CONFIRMS THAT LARAMAR IS ENTITLED TO FEES UP TO JUNE 3, 2011 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE RECEIVER AND LARAMAR FOR FINAL ACCOUNTING. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. EVENT PRODUCTIONS, INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 30, 2011, line 7, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT CONSENTED TO JURISDICTION OF THIS COURT BY FAILING TO SUMMARILY OBJECT TO JURISDICTION WHEN IT FILED AN ANSWER TO THE COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT HAS ALSO FAILED TO SUBMIT EVIDENCE REFUTING PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE THEREBY FAILING TO RAISE ANY TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. ACCORDINGLY PLAINTIFF HAS MET ITS EVIDENTIARY BURDEN WARRANTING THE GRANT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOREOVER, THE EVIDENCE SHOWS THAT DEFENDANT'S ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR JUDGMENT AGAINST THEM. =(302/LMG)
